title: Annabelle's Affairs
writer: Leon Gordon, Clare Kummer, Harlan Thompson
actors: Victor McLaglen, Jeanette MacDonald, Roland Young
plot: After only 11 hours of marriage, Annabelle and her husband separate-not knowing what each other truly looks like. Annabelle is given stocks in a mining enterprise by her husband and told not to part with them. Annabelle, an extrav...
